title: Senior Software Engineer - L&T Infotech International Enterprises - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - L&T Infotech International Enterprises - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
L&T Infotech International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About L&T Infotech International Enterprises:
L&T Infotech International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Infotech International Enterprises!
